detail_probe_batches.notes: Small batch preview from the first MOFX-DB API page. Do not promote to final records until source terms and experimental/computational origin are checked.

nist_mirror_batches.notes: Official GitHub mirror of the NIST ISODB API. This preview parses one DOI directory and linked adsorbent/adsorbate/bibliography JSON files.

input_pages.robots_notes: Use small API probes only; avoid bulk downloads until license and intended use are checked.
input_pages.selection_reason: MOFX-DB provides MOF structures, pore descriptors, MOF identifiers, and isotherm records through a JSON API.
input_pages.expected_content: MOF identifiers, CIF structures, pore descriptors, isotherm metadata, adsorbate names, pressure, temperature, capacity values, units.

parser_plan.accepted_record_policy: Do not add records to the final extracted table until experimental/computational origin and units are verified.

input_pages.robots_notes: Check NIST ISODB terms and API documentation before automated high-volume access.
input_pages.selection_reason: NIST ISODB is the primary candidate source for machine-readable experimental adsorption isotherms and DOI-linked provenance.
input_pages.expected_content: Adsorbent names, adsorbates, isotherm points, pressure, temperature, capacity values, units, DOI/source references.

parser_plan.tool: requests against the official GitHub API mirror
parser_plan.api_probe: The web route /isodb/api returns an app shell, but the official mirror at https://github.com/NIST-ISODB/isodb-library exposes equivalent JSON files.
parser_plan.accepted_record_policy: No records accepted until a stable endpoint/export path is identified and units are verified.
